name: Quick Baked or Fried Pies (Turnovers)
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir the oil into the dry biscuit mix with a fork until the mixture is uniform in color and texture.
2. Add apple juice to the mixture and stir until combined.
3. Let the dough rest for 2 minutes.
4. Knead the dough 12 to 15 times.
5. Roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
6. Cut into desired shapes using a biscuit cutter.
7. Roll the larger biscuits into thin circles.
8. Spoon 1-1/2 to 2-1/2 teaspoons of jam into the center of each circle.
9. Fold the circle in half and press the edges together.
10. Place the pies on a lightly oiled cookie sheet.
11. Brush the tops of the pies lightly with oil.
12. Bake at 375°F for 12 to 15 minutes or until done.
